releases.description: Added page speed optimizations, reduced render-blocking startup loads, and improved SEO and accessibility.
Internationalized the interface with localized routes, translated UI copy, SEO language links, and a footer language picker.
Fixed the loop-off instant-play animation so playlist rows collapse cleanly without snapping when a track is removed from the queue.
Added a condensed player view that moves the record into a left rail and tightens the timeline, title, and controls for a more compact playlist workspace.
Added a proper instant-play collapse flow so queue items slide closed before leaving the playlist when a track is sent to the player.
Simplified the empty-player state so the main Play button can start the first queued track when loop all is off.
Added the SVG logo, favicon set, WhatsApp share image, and social preview metadata.
Added a loop list feature so music can stay in the queue, loop continuously, and still be recorded in history.
Added drag-and-drop support for moving YouTube links from one browser window into the playlist for faster queue building, and updated the instructions to make the workflow clear.
